title: ipomoea glabra var. septenata
intro: Ipomoea glabra var. septenata, also known as Mexican morning glory, is a species of flowering plant in the Convolvulaceae family that has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties. The plant has been used to treat various health conditions, including fever, cough, and inflammation due to its antipyretic, expectorant, and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Ipomoea glabra var. septenata include reducing pain and inflammation, treating respiratory issues, and promoting relaxation, making it a popular herbal remedy. Ipomoea glabra var. septenata can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in traditional herbal medicine to promote overall well-being and alleviate various health ailments.
